options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  , 🔄 Reset Filters

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  snap_time AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' AS "time",
  metric,
  per_sec
FROM awr_load_profile
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
  AND metric IN ('Logical read (blocks)', 'Physical read (blocks)', 'Physical write (blocks)')
ORDER BY snap_time;

SELECT
  snap_time AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata' AS "time",
  metric,
  per_transaction
FROM awr_load_profile
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
  AND metric IN ('Logical read (blocks)', 'Physical read (blocks)', 'Physical write (blocks)')
ORDER BY snap_time;

list.description: Portal URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Grafana URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url

list.label: Database
list.name: dbname
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.label: Instance
list.name: instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.label: Start Snap
list.name: start_snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.label: End Snap
list.name: end_snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

title: fdv3.1 Load Profile – Blocks per Sec / Txn
